calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2020 Continued To Nov-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Approval Of Compromise And Settlement Of Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004 (Paga) Cause Of Action
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CRISTINA MOLTENI, Esq. of Molteni Employment Law (Tel: 415-762-0270) for plaintiffs;
Atty. WILLIAM SUNG, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 213-250-1800) for defendants Bannon Construction, Inc. and Brendan J. Sermon.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS JOSE GARAY, HECTOR GONZALEZ, JOSE GONZALEZ, JORGE AVALOS AND JOSE NAVARRETE'S Motion For Approval Of Compromise And Settlement Of Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004 (PAGA) Cause Of Action.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

The Court and counsel discuss the issues outlined in the court's tentative ruling. The parties indicate that they are amenable to the condition proposed by the Court that the Stipulation for Settlement of PAGA Claim shall be amended to provide that the cost of administration "shall not exceed" $1,500, rather than that the cost "is estimated to be" that amount. (Section II(4), at pg. 5.). The parties indicate they are in the process of circulating an amended stipulation for settlement for signatures.

Plaintiffs' counsel is to submit to the court by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a copy of the parties' signed amended stipulation for settlement, and a Word version of a proposed order to approve the settlement as amended.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

Motion For Approval Of Compromise And Settlement Of Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004 (Paga) Cause Of Action
Off Calendar Sep-10-2020 Continued To Sep-17-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSE GARAY, HECTOR GONZALEZ, JOSE GONZALEZ, JORGE AVALOS, JOSE NAVARRETE's Motion For Approval Of Compromise And Settlement Of Private Attorneys General Act Of 2004 (PAGA) Cause Of Action is Continued on the court's own motion to September 17, 2020 at 9:30 a.m.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
